title: 11 Billion Parameters Packaged into Six Scientific Brains: Shanghai AI Lab Opens Shenzhen Multimodal Model, Understanding Everything from Proteins to Weather Fields with One Model
excerpt: A model needs to decipher the sequence code of DNA, understand the spatiotemporal evolution of meteorological fields, and identify lesions in medical images—tas
content_html:
A model needs to decipher the sequence code of DNA, understand the spatiotemporal evolution of meteorological fields, and identify lesions in medical images—tasks that used to require multiple specialized models. On July 20, the Shanghai Institute for Scientific Intelligence unveiled a systematic solution to this challenge: the open science multimodal foundation model Shenzhen (Monkey King Bang, MKB), which uses about 11 billion parameters to simultaneously handle six types of scientific data—DNA, RNA, proteins, small molecules, Earth systems, and medical images—within a single unified model, both understanding and directly producing results.

On the track of scientific intelligence, specialized models have already emerged for protein, molecular, meteorological, and medical imaging directions, each performing excellently. However, their underlying principles are not compatible: sequences rely on sequential dependencies, molecules emphasize atomic connection structures, meteorological fields focus on spatiotemporal evolution, and medical images emphasize local details. How to preserve these differences while enabling a single model to learn shared patterns has always been an unavoidable question for scientific foundational models. Shenzhen was created precisely to address this issue.

Its backbone is Qwen3-VL-8B as a shared main body, with separate data processing pathways for the six types of scientific data. The key lies in not simplifying all data into a single format, but preserving the sequential relationships of sequences, the structural connections of molecules, the spatial distribution of meteorological fields, and the local details of medical images before they enter the shared model. Proteins and nucleic acids still follow sequences, small molecules still follow structures, meteorological data retain spatial distribution, and medical images retain image details. These capabilities are integrated into a single model, and corresponding functions can be called according to tasks. In addition to answering text, Shenzhen can also directly generate RNA sequences, machine-readable SMILES molecular representations, global meteorological fields, and medical image segmentation results.

With about 11 billion parameters, Shenzhen has demonstrated competitive performance in tasks such as biological sequences, small molecules, meteorology, and medical imaging. In 20 tasks covering DNA, RNA, proteins, and different biological sequence relationship judgments, Shenzhen achieved the best results among three competing models in 9 tasks and ranked in the top two in 17 tasks. When compared individually, it outperformed the same-scale Biology-Instructions model in 16 tasks, while facing the 1 trillion parameter Intern-S1-Pro model, both models excelled in 10 tasks. This comparison illustrates one thing: parameter scale is not the only benchmark for evaluating scientific model capabilities; designing effective modeling methods tailored to different scientific objects is a more worthy direction to continuously refine.

Breaking away from biological sequences, Shenzhen also validated its performance in small molecules, meteorology, and medical imaging. In the small molecule domain, in six attribute understanding tasks on the public benchmark SMolInstruct, Shenzhen achieved the best or tied best results in four tasks. In meteorology, during offline evaluation, given an initial atmospheric field, the model made a forecast every 6 hours, continuing to simulate up to the 10th day. By the 10th day, metrics such as 500hPa geopotential height, 2-meter temperature, and sea level pressure reached or exceeded the level of operational numerical forecasts. In medical image segmentation, in an evaluation covering nine imaging modalities such as CT, MRI, and pathology, with over 100,000 image-text samples, the average Dice score of Shenzhen's predicted region compared to manually labeled regions reached 91.20, ranking first among seven evaluation methods. When categorized by image type, five categories ranked first, and the remaining four ranked second.

Shenzhen integrates four representative capabilities into a single unified model: understanding biological sequences, predicting small molecule properties or generating SMILES, rolling out global meteorological fields up to 10 days long, and completing medical image segmentation based on textual prompts. Different tasks call upon respective processing components, but share the same model backbone and jointly trained weights, eliminating the need for researchers to switch between multiple independent domain models.

For scientific models, open weights are just the first step. Whether it can provide executable code, examples, and clear input-output instructions directly determines whether the model can be verified and reused. This release includes model weights, inference code, example scripts, input instructions, and usage documentation, and completes the configurations needed for weather forecasting and medical image segmentation, supporting researchers to deploy locally or integrate into existing research workflows. Researchers can download the model or use the API through the Xinghe Qizhi Scientific Intelligence Open Platform, combining it with over 1,500 other scientific models and tools. They can also download the weights on Hugging Face and obtain inference code and examples on GitHub.

As the super brain of the system-level scientific intelligence agent "Great Sage" launched at the beginning of March this year, the name "Shenzhen" comes from the "Divine Treasure Iron" in the Journey to the West. The team hopes that this open model will carry diverse scientific tasks in a relatively concise form and encourage more researchers to participate in testing, using, and co-building it.

On July 20, the Shanghai Institute for Scientific Intelligence unveiled a systematic solution to this challenge: the open science multimodal foundation model Shenzhen (Monkey King Bang, MKB), which uses about 11 billion parameters to simultaneously handle six types of scientific data—DNA, RNA, proteins, small molecules, Earth systems, and medical images—within a single unified model, both understanding and directly producing results.

sentences.zh: 模型需要破译 DNA 序列代码，了解气象场的时空演化，并识别医学图像中的病变——这些任务过去需要多个专门的模型。

sentences.en: When compared individually, it outperformed the same-scale Biology-Instructions model in 16 tasks, while facing the 1 trillion parameter Intern-S1-Pro model, both models excelled in 10 tasks.
sentences.zh: 单独比较时，它在 16 项任务中优于同规模的 Biology-Instructions 模型，而面对 1 万亿参数的 Intern-S1-Pro 模型，两个模型在 10 项任务中都表现出色。

sentences.en: This comparison illustrates one thing: parameter scale is not the only benchmark for evaluating scientific model capabilities; designing effective modeling methods tailored to different scientific objects is a more worthy direction to continuously refine.
sentences.zh: 这个比较说明了一件事：参数尺度并不是评估科学模型能力的唯一基准；参数尺度并不是评估科学模型能力的唯一标准。针对不同的科学对象设计有效的建模方法是一个更值得不断完善的方向。

In medical image segmentation, in an evaluation covering nine imaging modalities such as CT, MRI, and pathology, with over 100,000 image-text samples, the average Dice score of Shenzhen's predicted region compared to manually labeled regions reached 91.20, ranking first among seven evaluation methods. When categorized by image type, five categories ranked first, and the remaining four ranked second.

sentences.en: Breaking away from biological sequences, Shenzhen also validated its performance in small molecules, meteorology, and medical imaging.
sentences.zh: 脱离生物序列，深圳还验证了其在小分子、气象、医学成像方面的表现。

sentences.en: In the small molecule domain, in six attribute understanding tasks on the public benchmark SMolInstruct, Shenzhen achieved the best or tied best results in four tasks.
sentences.zh: 在小分子领域，在公共基准SMolInstruct上的六项属性理解任务中，深圳在四项任务中取得了最好或并列最好的成绩。

sentences.en: In meteorology, during offline evaluation, given an initial atmospheric field, the model made a forecast every 6 hours, continuing to simulate up to the 10th day.
sentences.zh: 在气象学方面，离线评估时，给定初始大气场，模型每6小时进行一次预报，持续模拟到第10天。

sentences.en: By the 10th day, metrics such as 500hPa geopotential height, 2-meter temperature, and sea level pressure reached or exceeded the level of operational numerical forecasts.
sentences.zh: 到第10天，500hPa位势高度、2米气温、海平面气压等指标均达到或超过业务数值预报水平。

sentences.en: In medical image segmentation, in an evaluation covering nine imaging modalities such as CT, MRI, and pathology, with over 100,000 image-text samples, the average Dice score of Shenzhen's predicted region compared to manually labeled regions reached 91.20, ranking first among seven evaluation methods.
sentences.zh: 在医学图像分割方面，在涵盖CT、MRI、病理等9种影像模式、超过10万个图文样本的评估中，深圳预测区域与人工标记区域的平均Dice得分达到91.20，在7种评估方法中排名第一。

sentences.en: When categorized by image type, five categories ranked first, and the remaining four ranked second.
sentences.zh: 按图像类型分类，有五个类别排名第一，其余四个类别排名第二。

Different tasks call upon respective processing components, but share the same model backbone and jointly trained weights, eliminating the need for researchers to switch between multiple independent domain models.

sentences.en: Shenzhen integrates four representative capabilities into a single unified model: understanding biological sequences, predicting small molecule properties or generating SMILES, rolling out global meteorological fields up to 10 days long, and completing medical image segmentation based on textual prompts.
sentences.zh: 深圳将四种代表性能力整合到一个统一模型中：理解生物序列、预测小分子特性或生成SMILES、推出长达10天的全球气象领域以及根据文本提示完成医学图像分割。

sentences.en: Different tasks call upon respective processing components, but share the same model backbone and jointly trained weights, eliminating the need for researchers to switch between multiple independent domain models.
sentences.zh: 不同的任务调用各自的处理组件，但共享相同的模型主干和联合训练的权重，从而消除了研究人员在多个独立领域模型之间切换的需要。

blocks.html_en: For scientific models, open weights are just the first step. Whether it can provide executable code, examples, and clear input-output instructions directly determines whether the model can be verified and reused. This release includes model weights, inference code, example scripts, input instructions, and usage documentation, and completes the configurations needed for weather forecasting and medical image segmentation, supporting researchers to deploy locally or integrate into existing research workflows. Researchers can download the model or use the API through the Xinghe Qizhi Scientific Intelligence Open Platform, combining it with over 1,500 other scientific models and tools. They can also download the weights on Hugging Face and obtain inference code and examples on GitHub.

sentences.en: For scientific models, open weights are just the first step.
sentences.zh: 对于科学模型来说，开放权重只是第一步。

sentences.en: Whether it can provide executable code, examples, and clear input-output instructions directly determines whether the model can be verified and reused.
sentences.zh: 能否提供可执行代码、示例以及清晰的输入输出指令，直接决定了模型能否被验证和复用。

sentences.en: This release includes model weights, inference code, example scripts, input instructions, and usage documentation, and completes the configurations needed for weather forecasting and medical image segmentation, supporting researchers to deploy locally or integrate into existing research workflows.
sentences.zh: 该版本包含模型权重、推理代码、示例脚本、输入指令和使用文档，并完成了天气预报和医学图像分割所需的配置，支持研究人员本地部署或集成到现有研究工作流程中。

sentences.en: Researchers can download the model or use the API through the Xinghe Qizhi Scientific Intelligence Open Platform, combining it with over 1,500 other scientific models and tools.
sentences.zh: 研究人员可以通过星河启智科学情报开放平台下载模型或使用API​​，将其与1500多个其他科学模型和工具结合起来。

sentences.en: They can also download the weights on Hugging Face and obtain inference code and examples on GitHub.
sentences.zh: 他们还可以在 Hugging Face 上下载权重，并在 GitHub 上获取推理代码和示例。

blocks.html_en: As the super brain of the system-level scientific intelligence agent "Great Sage" launched at the beginning of March this year, the name "Shenzhen" comes from the "Divine Treasure Iron" in the Journey to the West. The team hopes that this open model will carry diverse scientific tasks in a relatively concise form and encourage more researchers to participate in testing, using, and co-building it.

sentences.en: As the super brain of the system-level scientific intelligence agent "Great Sage" launched at the beginning of March this year, the name "Shenzhen" comes from the "Divine Treasure Iron" in the Journey to the West.
sentences.zh: 作为今年3月初推出的系统级科学情报特工“大圣”的超级大脑，“深圳”这个名字来源于西游记中的“神宝铁”。

sentences.en: The team hopes that this open model will carry diverse scientific tasks in a relatively concise form and encourage more researchers to participate in testing, using, and co-building it.
sentences.zh: 团队希望这个开放模型能够以相对简洁的形式承载多样化的科学任务，并鼓励更多的研究人员参与测试、使用和共建。

content_html_zh:
模型需要破译 DNA 序列代码，了解气象场的时空演化，并识别医学图像中的病变——这些任务过去需要多个专门的模型。 7月20日，上海科学智能研究院推出了针对这一挑战的系统解决方案：开放科学多模态基础模型深圳（Monkey King Bang，MKB），该模型使用约110亿个参数，在一个统一模型内同时处理六种类型的科学数据：DNA、RNA、蛋白质、小分子、地球系统和医学图像，既能理解又能直接产生结果。

在科学智能的轨道上，蛋白质、分子、气象、医学成像等方向的专门模型已经出现，并且每个方向都表现出色。 然而，它们的底层原理并不兼容：序列依赖于顺序依赖，分子强调原子连接结构，气象领域注重时空演化，医学图像强调局部细节。 如何保留这些差异，同时使单一模型能够学习共享模式一直是科学基础模型不可避免的问题。 深圳正是为了解决这个问题而诞生的。

其骨干是Qwen3-VL-8B作为共享主体，对六种类型的科学数据具有单独的数据处理路径。 关键在于不是将所有数据简化为单一格式，而是在进入共享模型之前保留序列的顺序关系、分子的结构连接、气象场的空间分布以及医学图像的局部细节。 蛋白质和核酸仍然遵循序列，小分子仍然遵循结构，气象数据保留空间分布，医学图像保留图像细节。 这些能力被集成到一个模型中，可以根据任务调用相应的函数。 除了回答文本，深圳还可以直接生成RNA序列、机器可读的SMILES分子表示、全球气象领域、医学图像分割结果。

深圳拥有约110亿个参数，在生物序列、小分子、气象、医学成像等任务中展现了竞争优势。 在涵盖DNA、RNA、蛋白质以及不同生物序列关系判断的20个任务中，深圳在9个任务中取得了三个竞争模型中最好的结果，并在17个任务中排名前两名。 单独比较时，它在 16 项任务中优于同规模的 Biology-Instructions 模型，而面对 1 万亿参数的 Intern-S1-Pro 模型，两个模型在 10 项任务中都表现出色。 这个比较说明了一件事：参数尺度并不是评估科学模型能力的唯一基准；参数尺度并不是评估科学模型能力的唯一标准。针对不同的科学对象设计有效的建模方法是一个更值得不断完善的方向。

脱离生物序列，深圳还验证了其在小分子、气象、医学成像方面的表现。 在小分子领域，在公共基准SMolInstruct上的六项属性理解任务中，深圳在四项任务中取得了最好或并列最好的成绩。 在气象学方面，离线评估时，给定初始大气场，模型每6小时进行一次预报，持续模拟到第10天。 到第10天，500hPa位势高度、2米气温、海平面气压等指标均达到或超过业务数值预报水平。 在医学图像分割方面，在涵盖CT、MRI、病理等9种影像模式、超过10万个图文样本的评估中，深圳预测区域与人工标记区域的平均Dice得分达到91.20，在7种评估方法中排名第一。 按图像类型分类，有五个类别排名第一，其余四个类别排名第二。

深圳将四种代表性能力整合到一个统一模型中：理解生物序列、预测小分子特性或生成SMILES、推出长达10天的全球气象领域以及根据文本提示完成医学图像分割。 不同的任务调用各自的处理组件，但共享相同的模型主干和联合训练的权重，从而消除了研究人员在多个独立领域模型之间切换的需要。

对于科学模型来说，开放权重只是第一步。 能否提供可执行代码、示例以及清晰的输入输出指令，直接决定了模型能否被验证和复用。 该版本包含模型权重、推理代码、示例脚本、输入指令和使用文档，并完成了天气预报和医学图像分割所需的配置，支持研究人员本地部署或集成到现有研究工作流程中。 研究人员可以通过星河启智科学情报开放平台下载模型或使用API​​，将其与1500多个其他科学模型和工具结合起来。 他们还可以在 Hugging Face 上下载权重，并在 GitHub 上获取推理代码和示例。

作为今年3月初推出的系统级科学情报特工“大圣”的超级大脑，“深圳”这个名字来源于西游记中的“神宝铁”。 团队希望这个开放模型能够以相对简洁的形式承载多样化的科学任务，并鼓励更多的研究人员参与测试、使用和共建。
